description: Healthie provides a healthcare operations platform for organizations to run digital care experiences, including scheduling, engagement, billing, EHR, and related workflows. Its product includes web and mobile software used by care teams and organizations.
summary: Healthie exposes a versioned GraphQL API at `api.gethealthie.com/graphql`, GraphQL subscriptions over WebSockets at `ws.gethealthie.com/subscriptions`, and an open-source local MCP server (Healthie Dev Assist) that uses a Healthie API key.
